title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 23 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 23 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 23 2025
summary:
Main
Today, iron ore futures con nued to hold up well, with the most-traded contract I2601 closing at 777 yuan, up 0.39% from the previous day.Spot cargoes at ports rose by 3 yuan compared to the previous working day, with PB fines in Shandong transacted at 777-783 yuan, unchanged from yesterday, and PB fines in Hebei transacted at 793-796 yuan, up 3 yuan from the previous day. Overall market transac ons were moderate, with steel mills purchasing mainly for rigid demand and traders selling at appropriate prices. Industrial data today showed that SMM hot-rolled coil inventories con nued to build up, while construc on materials saw slight destocking, though overall inventory pressure remained.
